name: Hermes Agent With Webui
tagline: Hermes Agent — autonomous AI agent with persistent memory, scheduling, and a self-hosted web chat UI.
description:
Hermes Agent — autonomous AI agent with persistent memory, scheduling, and a self-hosted web chat UI.

Docs: https://github.com/nesquena/hermes-webui?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  hermes-agent:
    image: nousresearch/hermes-agent@sha256:2f1f2f1725e5dc9a61cf6a2dea5aca52a776ec4d022cb29679e6aa3ff303e77a
    command: gateway run
    environment:
      - HERMES_HOME=/home/hermes/.hermes
      - HERMES_UID=1000
      - HERMES_GID=1000
      - OPENROUTER_API_KEY=${OPENROUTER_API_KEY:-fcea5d1de235df771e8c343e03f00f6e}
      - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:-131d6365708e9d22bacaa9c8875adff1}
      - OPENAI_API_KEY=${OPENAI_API_KEY:-f316cc51310f8ca2f62a6ca212ae1a66}
      - GOOGLE_API_KEY=${GOOGLE_API_KEY:-a2b3132768a081f45d663cd2df044920}
    volumes:
      - hermes-home:/home/hermes/.hermes
      - hermes-agent-src:/opt/hermes
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - test -d /home/hermes/.hermes || exit 1
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5
    restart: unless-stopped
  hermes-webui:
    image: ghcr.io/nesquena/hermes-webui:0.51.92
    depends_on:
      - hermes-agent
    environment:
      - HERMES_WEBUI_HOST=0.0.0.0
      - HERMES_WEBUI_PORT=8787
      - HERMES_WEBUI_STATE_DIR=/home/hermeswebui/.hermes/webui
      - WANTED_UID=1000
      - WANTED_GID=1000
      - HERMES_WEBUI_PASSWORD=b17a27e3a1f6f3a52444846488366f33
    volumes:
      - hermes-home:/home/hermeswebui/.hermes
      - hermes-agent-src:/home/hermeswebui/.hermes/hermes-agent:ro
      - hermes-workspace:/workspace
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:8787/health
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42050:8787
volumes:
  hermes-home: null
  hermes-agent-src: null
  hermes-workspace: null
